name: RegisterPatient
purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, and insurance are present in patient_data; if missing, return error. Generate a unique patient_id (e.g., UUID). Store patient record in patients database with registered_at timestamp. Return success with patient_id.

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

postconditions: patient record exists in patients database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with patient_id), message (str)

global_vars.description: Write new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

name: BookAppointment
purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database. Check that appointment_time is not in the past. Query appointments database for doctor_id at requested time to ensure no conflict. If available, create appointment record with status 'confirmed' and generate appointment_id. Return success with appointment details.

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id, details), message

postconditions: appointment record created in appointments database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with appointment_id, details), message (str)

global_vars.description: Check availability and create appointment record

data_operations.description: Query availability and insert new appointment

constraints.description: appointment_time must be in the future
No existing appointment for same doctor at same time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record created with status 'confirmed' and unique appointment_id

name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id. Sort by timestamp descending. Return list of records.

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (list of records), message (str)

global_vars.description: Read medical records for given patient_id

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database (implicitly checked by parent)

acceptance_criteria.description: All matching records returned sorted by timestamp descending

name: UpdatePatientProfile
purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
behavior: Check patient_id exists. Update allowed fields (name, dob, contact) in patients database. If insurance field is present and changed, validate against external system (simulated check). If validation fails, return error. Otherwise, update insurance. Return success with updated profile.

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success (bool), data (dict with updated fields), message (str)

global_vars.description: Read current profile and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read patient record, validate insurance, update fields

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database
Insurance change must pass external validation

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile updated with validated fields
